# Quick Fix: Risk Badge Color Differentiation
Generated: 2026-04-01T11-11-20Z

## Changes Made

### File 1: WizardSection.tsx (website showcase)
- File: `apps/web/src/components/sections/WizardSection.tsx`
- Lines: 62-66
- Change: `riskConfig` — replaced uniform `text-brand-400 / bg-brand-500/10` across all three levels with semantically distinct colors:
  - SAFE → `text-green-400 / bg-green-500/10`
  - LOW → `text-yellow-400 / bg-yellow-500/10`
  - MEDIUM → `text-amber-400 / bg-amber-500/10`

### File 2: PlaybookReviewStep.tsx (os-desktop in-app)
- File: `apps/os-desktop/src/renderer/pages/wizard/steps/PlaybookReviewStep.tsx`
- Lines: ~18 (new `RiskDot` component) + action row (~120)
- Change: Added `RiskDot` helper component (6px colored circle, `dotOnly` style) mapped from `action.risk` string. Rendered as the first element inside the action name flex row, before the name text. Colors:
  - safe → `bg-green-400`
  - low → `bg-yellow-400`
  - medium → `bg-amber-400`
  - high → `bg-red-400`

### File 3: RiskBadge.tsx (tuning-desktop)
- File: `apps/tuning-desktop/src/renderer/components/ui/RiskBadge.tsx`
- Lines: 26-30, 39-44
- Change: Two levels were wrong:
  - `low` was identical to `safe` (green) — changed to yellow (`bg-yellow-400 / text-yellow-400 / bg-yellow-900/20 / border-yellow-800/50`)
  - `high` used brand color — changed to red (`bg-red-400 / text-red-400 / bg-red-950/60 / border-red-800`)
  - `safe` and `medium` / `extreme` were already correct, left untouched

## Verification
- TypeScript check (os-desktop): PASS — no errors
- Scope: only risk badge colors touched, no layout or logic changes

## Files Modified
1. `apps/web/src/components/sections/WizardSection.tsx` — riskConfig color fix
2. `apps/os-desktop/src/renderer/pages/wizard/steps/PlaybookReviewStep.tsx` — RiskDot component added
3. `apps/tuning-desktop/src/renderer/components/ui/RiskBadge.tsx` — low/high color fix

## Notes
- `extreme` in RiskBadge uses brand color (same as old `high`). Left as-is — not in scope and brand-colored extreme is defensible as a distinct tier above red.
- The `ActionItem` type in WizardSection only has SAFE/LOW/MEDIUM levels — HIGH is not in the showcase data, so no HIGH entry was needed there.
